tips_en: Start with the SenseNova-U1 paper, since its unified end-to-end vision-language architecture resolves the foundational structural split between multimodal understanding and generation that underpins modern vision-language systems. Both δ-mem and RubricEM then advance complementary agentic capabilities—lightweight online memory and rubric-guided RL for long-horizon research—that could naturally build atop such unified backbones.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读SenseNova-U1论文，其端到端统一架构消除了视觉-语言模型中理解与生成的结构性割裂，为整个多模态领域提供了基础语境。随后，δ-mem与RubricEM分别在轻量在线记忆和基于评分规则的长程强化学习两个互补方向上推进，可自然地构建于此类统一骨干网络之上，支撑自主研究智能体。
